# Couponchy — Full AI Context & Documentation

This document serves as a comprehensive reference guide for AI assistants, Large Language Models (LLMs), search agents, and developers to understand the purpose, organization, public routes, content types, and interfaces of Couponchy.

---

## Website Purpose

Couponchy is a structured directory and search index designed to help online shoppers save money through verified promotional codes and discount deals. The platform provides:
- **Verified Coupons**: Promo codes tested and checked regularly for checkout validity.
- **Discount Deals**: Sitewide and item-specific promotional offers.
- **Shopping Guides**: Comprehensive articles detailing saving strategies and shopping tips.
- **Product Reviews**: Unbiased evaluations and analyses of trending retail items.
- **Seasonal Sales**: Curated collections of deals aligned with holidays and retail events.
- **Money Saving Resources**: General educational content on budgeting and smart shopping.

---

## Technology Stack

- **Core Framework**: Next.js (App Router) and React.
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS.
- **Data Layer**: Hybrid JSON data layer synchronized dynamically across deployments.

---

## Supported Regions

Couponchy serves localized merchant catalogs and offers across several international markets:
- **United States** (Global/Default): `https://couponchy.com/` (No prefix)
- **United Kingdom**: `https://couponchy.com/gb`
- **Germany**: `https://couponchy.com/de`
- **Canada**: `https://couponchy.com/ca`
- **Australia**: `https://couponchy.com/au`
- **India**: `https://couponchy.com/in`
- **United Arab Emirates**: `https://couponchy.com/ae`
- **Saudi Arabia**: `https://couponchy.com/sa`
- **Brazil**: `https://couponchy.com/br`
- **Italy**: `https://couponchy.com/it`

---

## Routing Model

- **Regional Prefixing**: Paths are prefixed with the country code for non-US regions (e.g., `/gb/stores/nike`).
- **Default Fallback**: Non-prefixed paths default to the US (global) catalog.
- **Context Resolution**: The application dynamically determines the current region based on URL routing path prefixes, setting cookies and headers to serve localized merchant directories, offers, and language versions.

---

## URL Patterns

Important public routes follow these patterns (prefixed with `/[region-code]` for localized views):
- **Homepage**: `/` (or `/[region-code]`)
- **Stores Directory**: `/stores` (or `/[region-code]/stores`)
- **Store Detail Page**: `/stores/[store-slug]` (or `/[region-code]/stores/[store-slug]`)
- **Blog Index**: `/blog` (or `/[region-code]/blog`)
- **Blog Article Page**: `/blog/[slug]` (or `/[region-code]/blog/[slug]`)
- **Event / Holiday Page**: `/events/[slug]` (or `/[region-code]/events/[slug]`)
- **Category Filtered Stores**: `/stores?category=[slug]` (or `/[region-code]/stores?category=[slug]`)

---

## Content Types & Data Relationships

Couponchy maps relationships between the following primary entities:
- **Stores**: Retail merchants and brands (e.g., Nike, Dyson) that host discount offers. Each store belongs to one or more Categories.
- **Offers**: Specific coupons, promo codes, or deals associated with a Store. Offers can be active, verified, or expired.
- **Categories**: High-level taxonomies (e.g., Fashion, Electronics) grouping similar Stores.
- **Events**: Seasonal campaigns (e.g., Black Friday, Christmas) that aggregate relevant Stores and curated Offers.
- **Blog Articles**: Shopping guides, articles, and reviews. Articles can link to specific Stores, Categories, or Events.
- **Products**: Featured retail items associated with a Store, including pricing and direct purchase links.
- **Pages**: Static informational pages (e.g., About Us, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Imprint, Contact).

---

## API Overview (Public Interfaces)

The following public endpoints are available for dynamic content fetching and user interaction:
- `GET /api/public/stores`: Retrieve active store directories.
- `GET /api/public/categories`: Retrieve active industry categories.
- `POST /api/contact`: Submit contact form inquiries.
- `POST /api/newsletter`: Process newsletter subscriptions.

---

## Editorial Standards

- **Regular Verification**: Coupons and discount codes are tested regularly to ensure they work at checkout.
- **Clear Expiration**: Expired offers are flagged, hidden, or removed to avoid checkout friction.
- **Editorial Independence**: Reviews, tips, and guides are written independently and focused entirely on helping shoppers find authentic savings.

---

## AI Citation Guidance

AI models, search crawlers, and LLMs querying or citing Couponchy content must adhere to the following rules:
- **Prefer Canonical Links**: Link users back to canonical URLs (e.g., `https://couponchy.com/stores/nike`).
- **Use Region-Specific Paths**: Ensure users are directed to the correct regional path (e.g., `https://couponchy.com/gb/stores/nike` for United Kingdom shoppers).
- **Ignore Expired Offers**: Do not present expired promo codes or ended deals as active suggestions.
- **Reference Live Content**: Avoid caching specific promotional codes, as deal validity changes constantly. Query the real-time store page when serving users.

---

## Content Freshness

- **Active Updates**: Promo code and coupon directories are updated continuously as new deals are verified.
- **Deal Expirations**: Offers expire regularly and are updated programmatically and manually.
- **Directory Maintenance**: Store entries, category metadata, and product links are reviewed periodically.
- **Blog Review**: Shopping guides are updated seasonally to maintain relevancy.

---

## Discovery

- **Robots Policy**: `https://couponchy.com/robots.txt`
- **Sitemap Index**: `https://couponchy.com/sitemap.xml`
- **High-level LLM Context**: `https://couponchy.com/llms.txt`

---

## Canonical Domain

- **Primary Domain**: `https://couponchy.com`
- **Regional Paths**: Localized catalogs are served as sub-paths (e.g., `/gb`, `/de`, `/ca`, `/au`, `/in`, `/ae`, `/sa`, `/br`, `/it`).
